form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign when last of 9 at Funabashi January 22 over 1800m, 9 len behind Gloria Mundi with 57kg at $56.90. Previously first up; second last of 10 at Urawa October 29 over 2000m, 14 len behind Suleyman with 57kg at $8.10. Happy to work around.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of nine weeks. Finished off last campaign won by head this track February 5 over 1600m defeating Gold Heuer with 57kg at $1.70. First up last campaign fifth of 15 at Niigata Dirt August 17 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Kurojishi Joe carrying 58.0kg at $5.10. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Freshened for 42 days. Last outing crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 5th of 13 at Urawa on February 26 over 1400m, 4 len behind George Tesoro with 56kg at $3.30. At only start last preparation raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 7 at this track on August 26 over 1600m, 14 len behind Rinzo Channel carrying 54kg at $2. Among the top chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 13 months. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at Funabashi March 11 2025 over 1600m, 11 len behind Fauvisme carrying 57kg at $289.70. When resuming last campaign seventh of 14 at this track July 4 2024 over 1600m, 9 len behind Fauvisme carrying 57kg at $10. Marginal prospect.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resumes off a 47 day letup. First-up 5th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on January 12 over 1200m, 7 len behind Dragon Welds with 56.0kg at $54.80. Second-up 12th of 16 at Hanshin Dirt on February 21 over 1400m, 6 len behind Bergeronnette with 58.0kg at $96.70. Watch for him late in the piece.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 51-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 15 at Ohi on February 17 over 1800m, 3 len behind Victipharus carrying 56kg at $5.50. The start before that ran last of 15 at Ohi Tokyo Daishoten on December 29 over 2000m, 25 len behind Diktaean with 57kg at $384.50. This is well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Freshened for 37 days. Resuming won by 0.5 len at this track February 6 over 1500m defeating Hokko Somnium carrying 57kg at $3.70. Second-up made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 14 at this track on March 3 over 1500m, 0.5 len behind Thunder Bass carrying 57kg at $3.40. Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 56-day let-up. First-up after three months struggled in the run home; 7th of 13 at Funabashi on February 12 over 1600m, 10 len behind Abrams with 57kg at $3.40. Previously second-up favourite; won by a neck at Ohi November 12 over 1600m defeating Mut Kurve carrying 57kg at $3.40. Among the top chances.
